hero.title: Fuel Expense Tracker
hero.description: Track vehicle fuel purchases, fuel quantity, odometer readings, station spending, and monthly fuel cost trends from your own entries.
points: Review total and monthly fuel costs

flow.title: Vehicles -> Entries -> Insights
steps: Add each vehicle you want to track
Record fuel purchases with date, odometer, quantity, cost, station, and payment notes
Review totals, recent entries, fuel economy, and station summaries

differences.title: A focused fuel spending log
differences.description: Fuel Expense Tracker keeps purchase records and cost analysis separate from maintenance, diagnostics, and trip planning tools.

items.title: Vehicle list
items.description: Maintain a simple vehicle roster with odometer unit, fuel type, notes, and archive controls.

items.title: Fuel entries
items.description: Capture each purchase with quantity, total cost, derived unit price, station, payment method, full-tank flag, and notes.

items.title: Cost review
items.description: Summarize fuel spend by month, vehicle, and station using only the user's stored records.

feel.title: A clean logbook for fuel costs
feel.description: The workflow is built for repeated quick entry, then calm review when users want to understand spending patterns.

items.title: Fast entry
items.description: The entry form keeps the expected purchase fields together.

items.title: Clear totals
items.description: Dashboard metrics show total cost, monthly cost, total fuel, and average price.

items.title: Personal tracking
items.description: Fuel economy estimates come from user-entered odometer readings, not connected vehicle diagnostics.

audiences.title: Who uses Fuel Expense Tracker
audiences.description: The app is for individuals and households who want a reliable fuel purchase history.

items.title: Commuters
items.description: Keep a searchable record of regular fuel purchases.

items.title: Families
items.description: Track costs across multiple personal vehicles.

items.title: Budget reviewers
items.description: Review monthly fuel spending without mixing it into general expenses.

resourceSection.title: Fuel tracking essentials
resourceSection.description: The app focuses on records the user can verify from receipts, odometer readings, and station details.

items.title: Vehicles
items.description: Name, fuel type, odometer unit, and archive status.

items.title: Entries
items.description: Purchase date, odometer, quantity, cost, station, payment method, and notes.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Monthly cost, vehicle spend, station frequency, and recent purchases.

groupedSection.title: From receipt to review
groupedSection.description: Fuel Expense Tracker keeps the path from purchase logging to cost insight short and predictable.

items.name: Vehicle
items.description: Select the vehicle before saving a purchase.

items.name: Receipt fields
items.description: Record quantity, total cost, currency, station, and payment method.

items.name: Vehicle comparison
items.description: Compare total fuel cost across stored vehicles.

technicalSection.title: Built as an isolated mini app
technicalSection.description: Fuel Expense Tracker follows the Ansiversa mini-app pattern with its own database, API routes, overview metadata, and workflow pages.
items: Owner-scoped vehicle and fuel entry records.
Coming-soon catalog status preserved until manual verification approves launch.

finalCta.title: Open Fuel Expense Tracker
finalCta.description: Start with fuel entries, then review vehicles and insights.
